Contact us
IP & Moat

A layered patent wall behind every device

Intellectual property is core to how we build. Every device gets a layered patent family across method, hardware, and data. Below is the Histo-Cooling family, and the template for what follows.

FiledInvention patent · method + device + data system
FiledUtility model · PCM + liquid-metal + IP68 structure
PendingDivisional · blinding mode
PendingDivisional · fault-tolerant storage
PlannedFurther divisionals planned

How long it takes to replicate

12–18 mo

The time to honestly replicate the sealed active-cooling hardware. That is a physics moat.

18–24 mo

For an audit-passing clinical-grade firmware and data-integrity stack.

24–36 mo

For the whole stack plus clinical validation and clearance, with no guarantee of clearing the patent family.

The real moat is the combination of patents, clinical data, regulatory clearance, and partnerships, not any single one.

Disclaimer: The product described (Histo-Cooling) is under development and has not obtained medical device registration from China’s NMPA. All technical and functional descriptions on this site are for technical, investment, and partnership communication only, and do not constitute a medical device advertisement, an offer of sale, or any diagnostic or treatment advice. Patent status is subject to the official records of the CNIPA.
